section.heading: Model authorities

content.p: In making determinations under section 2200h of this title, the Secretary of Defense shall use the authorities under chapters 103 and 111 of this title as guides.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 116–92, div. A, title VIII, § 860(a), Dec. 20, 2019, 133 Stat. 1514; amended Pub. L. 116–283, div. A, title X, § 1081(a)(4)(A), Jan. 1, 2021, 134 Stat. 3870.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2021—Pub. L. 116–283 substituted “§” for “SEC.” in section designation.
